title: Koko Eating Bananas
coreIdea: Instead of searching in an array, binary search over the range of possible answer values (eating speed) to find the minimum speed that satisfies a feasibility condition (finishing within h hours), checked using a helper feasibility function.
recognitionCues: asks for minimum/maximum value satisfying a condition
feasibility can be checked in a monotonic way (if speed k works, any speed > k also works)
not searching within a given array directly
approach: Binary search between 1 and max(piles). For each candidate speed (mid), calculate total hours needed by summing ceil(pile/speed) for each pile. If hours <= h, try smaller speed (search left); else search right. Converge to minimum feasible speed.
